'''âdh-s-p-n''' ('''kadhaspenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beatify|beatify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beatify|beatify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-s-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhaspenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhaspenoko|thidhaspenoko]] || [[word:jidhaspenoko|jidhaspenoko]] || [[word:shidhaspenoko|shidhaspenoko]] || [[word:kidhaspenoko|kidhaspenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhaspenoko|thĂŠdhaspenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhaspenoko|jĂŠdhaspenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhaspenoko|shĂŠdhaspenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhaspenoko|kĂŠdhaspenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhaspenoko|thadhaspenoko]] || [[word:jadhaspenoko|jadhaspenoko]] || [[word:shadhaspenoko|shadhaspenoko]] || [[word:kadhaspenoko|kadhaspenoko]]
|}
